column1: Saturday's match against Athletic Club marked Barcelona's return to the new Camp Nou on November 1, 2025.
The biggest defeat suffered by Barcelona in the 2025-2026 season was a 0-3 loss to Chelsea in the Champions League group stage.
Marcus Rashford has the most assists in La Liga for Barcelona in the 2025-2026 season.
The first penalty kick saved by Barcelona goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny was in a game against PSG on October 2, 2025.
The biggest victory of FC Barcelona in the 2025-2026 season was winning all three national titles, including Supercopa and Copa del Rey against Real Madrid.
Two red cards were given in the fixture between FC Barcelona and Mallorca in August 2025.
Lamine Yamal's jersey number for the 2025-2026 season is 10.
